subject: Re: CF
body:
wold you like me to convince chris?u

--- jeanluc brunel <jeanlucbrunel@msn.com> wrote:

> After the unexpected of yesterday, it might be
> better with an other solution
> Chris is very close to IMG and cannot give up his
> man division.It means that 
> he might not have the strenght to fight. Don't
> forget that he was asking 8 
> weeks vacation.
> Gerald knows a great girl, respected by the fashion
> business who could help 
> to get the right bookers. She knows them all. It
> will give Gerald the 
> possibility to tell his agents that she is in charge
> of putting it together. 
> I prefer this solution that buid up on an existing
> structure.
> Gerald has few very good girls but I cannot immagine
> seeing them all right 
> away.I don't want to become the image maker for
> Paris bearing all the costs 
> for some ghosts. We have to go step by step.
> Gerald loves Directors He had 3 or 4 when he was in
> NY. None of them were 
> good, this is how they have lost so much,
> I want to avoid those costly mistakes
> Chris was the only one suitable for the job, but he
> is not ready and it does 
> not make sese to buy the men's dep, 150.000 profit a
> year.
> Chris then will not do the women correctly
> 
> 
> 
> 
> jeanluc@mc2mm.com
> 
> 
>

body_html:
wold you like me to convince chris?u

--- jeanluc brunel jeanlucbrunel@msn.com wrote:

After the unexpected of yesterday, it might be
better with an other solution
Chris is very close to IMG and cannot give up his
man division.It means that
he might not have the strenght to fight. Don't
forget that he was asking 8
weeks vacation.
Gerald knows a great girl, respected by the fashion
business who could help
to get the right bookers. She knows them all. It
will give Gerald the
possibility to tell his agents that she is in charge
of putting it together.
I prefer this solution that buid up on an existing
structure.
Gerald has few very good girls but I cannot immagine
seeing them all right
away.I don't want to become the image maker for
Paris bearing all the costs
for some ghosts. We have to go step by step.
Gerald loves Directors He had 3 or 4 when he was in
NY. None of them were
good, this is how they have lost so much,
I want to avoid those costly mistakes
Chris was the only one suitable for the job, but he
is not ready and it does
not make sese to buy the men's dep, 150.000 profit a
year.
Chris then will not do the women correctly
